channel.title: interview skills on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in interview skills on Frank Huang

item.title: Questions that you should ask in your tech interview?
item.description: Try to judge your interviewers what are the most interesting things that your have been working on so far in this company? fire fighting and project working time distribution during one week? what things you want to change in your current working environment ? How do you deal with the situation when there is a feature that must be shipped to the client but you still have some features that finished on your list?
